chapter_title.en: The meaning of the names of Muhammed, Ali, Fatima, Hasan, Hussain and the Imams, peace be upon them

text: وقد روي: إنما سميت الزهراء لان الله عز وجل خلقها من نور عظمته.

en.basel-kadem: 16.	It was reported: She was only named Zahra because Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He, created her from the Light of His Greatness.
